article_meta.title: A California judge scolded members of Mark Zuckerberg's legal team after they showed up to a Los Angeles courtroom weari

reasoning: Correct Center classification, but confidence is a bit high and the reasoning/key_indicators fail to cite specific authorial prose. Indicators are generic and one relies on outlet reputation rather than the article’s own wording.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article reads as neutral, descriptive courtroom reporting with no partisan framing; Center is appropriate.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.85 is slightly high for a neutral report; clearer calibration would be around 0.7–0.8.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: No specific phrases from the author’s prose were cited; indicators were generic and one referenced outlet lean rather than text-based evidence.
